articles.title: Energy-Efficient Liquid Cooling for Advanced Semiconductor Packaging (KAIST)
articles.summary: A new technical paper, “Highly energy-efficient manifold microchannel for cooling electronics with a coefficient of performance over 100,000,” was published by researchers at KAIST. The study presents a CMOS-compatible manifold microchannel cooler that removes over 2,000 W/cm² using single-phase water at only 8 kPa pressure drop, achieving a record COP of 106,000—a significant improvement over prior state-of-the-art liquid-cooling technologies for advanced semiconductor packaging. The results point to a scalable thermal-management pathway for next-generation heterogeneous integration, 3D packaging, and AI/HPC chips, where thermal density is becoming a primary packaging bottleneck. Find the technical paper here . Published April 2026. Preprint download is available here . Lee, Y
articles.title_zh: 用於先進半導體封裝的節能液冷技術 (KAIST)
articles.summary_zh: KAIST 研究人員發表新論文介紹一款 CMOS 相容的歧管微通道冷卻器，能以超過 100,000 的性能係數移除超過 2,000 W/cm² 的熱量。

articles.title: This open-source E-Ink smartwatch project trades features for extreme battery life
articles.summary: TL;DR An open-source project called LightInk could put an ultra-efficient E-Ink display on your wrist. The watch reportedly uses just ~0.5mAh per day, translating to roughly 40 days of battery life in typical use. It is also solar powered, and aggressively optimized for “infinite” runtime under the right conditions. E-Ink already makes a lot of sense for reading, and now someone’s making a strong case for wearing it, too. A new open-source project called LightInk is gaining attention for turning an E-Ink panel into a minimalist wrist watch, pushing battery life to an extreme that most wearables can’t offer. At the heart of the device is an ESP32, a low-cost microcontroller known for its Wi-Fi support and ultra-low-power sleep modes. It’s paired with a small E-Ink display, similar to the pa
articles.title_zh: 此開源 E Ink 智慧手錶專案以功能換極限電池壽命
articles.summary_zh: LightInk 開源專案可在手腕上配置超高效 E Ink 螢幕，據報電池消耗率僅約每天 0.5mAh，在典型使用下約可續航 40 天。

articles.title: Good Lock-style personalization tools could be in the works for another phone brand
articles.summary: TL;DR A new rumor claims that OPPO is beta testing its own version of Samsung Good Lock. The customization tool is reportedly in development for OxygenOS 17 and ColorOS 17. Right now the rumor is still light on details, and needs further confirmation. There is something just so viscerally satisfying about a personally customized device that just really feels exclusively ours . Maybe you pull that off with a really expressive case , or you like to keep things fresh with new wallpapers . Going much deeper than that used to require running a custom ROM or installing a new launcher , but in recent years we’ve seen manufacturers develop their own full-featured customization engines, like Samsung’s Good Lock . And this week we’re learning about what could be the next Android phones to get their

Google’s rolling out an update for the Google Home app that should improve the smart home experience in a lot of little ways, specifically for users with cameras. Release notes for the latest Google Home update include improvements like simplified camera settings and search, as well as a new tool to fix certain offline device errors. The update notes were published in a blog post this week. The headlining improvement is a “modernized” camera UI that includes dynamic theming, as well as AI-generated event descriptions on the camera event timeline

Valve is working on bringing Steam directly to your living room with the new Steam Machine . However, the company has yet to reveal the release date for the hardware. If you’re desperate to start playing your PC games on your couch and you have a PlayStation 5, there’s an alternative you may want to consider. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?

articles.title: Don’t panic: Qi2 magnetic charging still has plenty of fans, despite MagSafe rumors
articles.summary: TL;DR Apple is reportedly considering changing its MagSafe strategy. This could potentially mean some future iPhones will ship without magnetic charging built in. Less competition around magnetic charging would likely be bad for Qi2 adoption, but the Qi2 standard is independent and not directly influenced by Apple. Android’s been slow to catch onto magnetic wireless charging, with Google only first implementing it in last year’s Pixel 10 series and segment leader Samsung still not offering full Qi2 compatibility in any device. A new rumor about Apple’s MagSafe could be bad news for Qi2’s future prospects on Android. As spotted by MacRumors , leaker Instant Digital has claimed on Weibo that there’s internal debate at Apple as to whether MagSafe should be a standard feature in future iPhones
articles.title_zh: 別擔心：儘管有MagSafe傳言，Qi2磁性充電仍有眾多支持者
articles.summary_zh: 據報導Apple正在考慮改變其MagSafe策略，這可能意味著未來某些iPhone將不配備磁性充電功能。磁性充電競爭減少可能對Qi2的採用不利，但Qi2標準是獨立的。

articles.title: OnePlus and realme have reportedly merged, and that doesn’t sound like good news for either
articles.summary: Credit: Joe Maring / Android Authority TL;DR OnePlus and Realme are reported to have officially merged. A sub-business unit has been established, with realme founder Li Bingzhong appointed as general manager. Li Jie, president of OnePlus China, has been put in charge of the sub-series product center. Since early this year, there have been rumors suggesting that OnePlus could shut down. The company’s executives have repeatedly denied these claims, despite a list of high-profile departures and a winding down of global operations. While the company isn’t shutting down, it is going through a change that includes fellow OPPO sub-brand realme. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
articles.title_zh: OnePlus和realme據報已合併，這對雙方來說似乎都不是好消息
articles.summary_zh: OnePlus和Realme據報已正式合併，成立了子業務部門，由realme創始人李兵忠擔任總經理。OnePlus中國總裁李傑負責子系列產品中心。

articles.title: Google Messages migration nightmare: Former Samsung Messages users watch chats vanish in real time
articles.summary: Credit: Edgar Cervantes / Android Authority TL;DR Samsung Messages users who are migrating to Google Messages are missing some of their conversations. A Google Product Expert has confirmed that the vanishing messages bug is linked to the phasing out of Samsung Messages. The issue is being caused by a sync and re-indexing delay. If you’re unaware, Samsung is sunsetting its Messages app and sending its users to Google Messages. As the end of the road is in sight, July 2026 , more and more users are now migrating over to Google’s solution. However, it appears that some of these users are running into an issue where old and new chats are suddenly disappearing. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
articles.title_zh: Google Messages遷移惡夢：前Samsung Messages用戶實時看著聊天記錄消失
articles.summary_zh: 遷移到Google Messages的Samsung Messages用戶遺失了部分對話。Google產品專家已確認消失訊息的問題與Samsung Messages停用有關。

articles.title: Quick Share AirDrop support expands to more flagship Android phones
articles.summary: Credit: Hadlee Simons / Android Authority TL;DR AirDrop-style sharing already works on devices like Pixel 10 and Galaxy S26, and more brands are now joining. OPPO Find X9 Ultra and vivo X300 Ultra are among the first non-Google/Samsung phones to adopt the unified system. Quick Share has been Android’s version of AirDrop for some time, but it really only worked well on Google Pixel or Samsung Galaxy phones. If you used another brand, you probably had to deal with different, incompatible sharing options. This is beginning to change. While AirDrop-style sharing with Quick Share already works on the newest Samsung and Pixel phones, such as the Pixel 10 and Galaxy S26 , other Android brands are starting to support it too.
articles.title_zh: Quick Share AirDrop支持擴展到更多安卓旗艦機
articles.summary_zh: AirDrop風格的分享已在Pixel 10和Galaxy S26等設備上運作，更多品牌現在加入。OPPO Find X9 Ultra和vivo X300 Ultra是首批採用統一系統的非Google/Samsung手機。

articles.title: Hack your old Google Home Mini into a Home Assistant-ready offline smart speaker with this DIY kit
articles.summary: TL;DR The MiciMike Home Mini Drop-In PCB kit is made to replace the internals of the Google Home Mini, making it a Home Assistant-compatible offline speaker. The kit also allows the speaker to be used with cloud-based services like ChatGPT. You can get a kit for $85. They’re expected to ship in October. The first-generation Google Home Mini is nearly a decade old at this point, and with so many in circulation, there’s a decent chance you might have one sitting around unused. If you’re looking for something to do with a spare, an upcoming crowdfunded kit will let you swap the Home Mini’s guts to make it a fully local smart speaker that can control your gadgets without any data leaving your home. The MiciMike Home Mini Drop-In PCB is made to install inside your existing first-generation Goog
articles.title_zh: 用這個DIY套件將舊Google Home Mini改造成Home Assistant無網絡智能喇叭
articles.summary_zh: MiciMike Home Mini Drop-In PCB套件用於替換Google Home Mini的內部，使其成為Home Assistant相容的無網絡喇叭。該套件還可與ChatGPT等雲端服務配合使用，售價$85，預計10月發貨。

articles.title: You can now get Gemini to generate downloadable files directly in chat
articles.summary: Credit: Joe Maring / Android Authority TL;DR Gemini can now generate and package downloadable files directly in chat. The chatbot is capable of generating files in a variety of formats, including HTML, PDF, XML, and more. It appears that transparent PNGs don’t work yet. Gemini has received a few updates recently, like the expansion of Personal Intelligence . Don’t look now, but Google is rolling out yet another update to the chatbot. And this is a change that seems to have a lot of users excited. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
articles.title_zh: 你現在可以直接在Gemini聊天中生成可下載的文件
articles.summary_zh: Gemini現在可以直接在聊天中生成和打包可下載的文件，支持HTML、PDF、XML等多種格式。透明PNG目前似乎還不支持。

articles.title: Motorola’s 2026 Razr series is better and more expensive than ever
articles.summary: TL;DR The 2026 Moto Razr, Razr Plus, and Razr Ultra have been announced. All models are equipped with upgraded cameras for better low-light performance. The Razr Ultra gets a massive 5,000mAh silicon-carbon battery. Motorola has just announced its new lineup of flip phones with the 2026 Razr, Razr Plus, and Razr Ultra. The Razr series has already given us some of our favorite folding phones , and provides strong competition to Samsung’s Galaxy Z Flip 7 . So, what do this year’s offerings bring to the table over the already excellent models from last year? Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?

articles.title: Motorola beats Samsung, Google to silicon-carbon batteries in the US
articles.summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Y46Qof-VHfA TL;DR Motorola is making the switch from traditional Lithium-ion batteries to silicon-carbon batteries on its 2026 lineup of flagship foldables. Both the Motorola Razr Ultra 2026 and Razr Fold each pack 5,000mAh and 6,000mAh silicon-carbon batteries, respectively. The technology allowed Motorola to add battery capacity to the Razr Ultra 2026 without touching the dimensions or weight. For better or worse, the major US smartphone brands haven’t adopted silicon-carbon battery technology. Apple, Google, and Samsung keep sticking with traditional Lithium-ion batteries for their reliability, ignoring the benefits of compact and high-capacity silicon-carbon batteries. The upside of using silicon-carbon batteries in smartphones , especially foldables, is
articles.title_zh: Motorola在美國率先採用矽碳電池，領先Samsung和Google
articles.summary_zh: Motorola在其2026年旗艦可摺疊手機系列上從傳統鋰離子電池轉換到矽碳電池。Motorola Razr Ultra 2026和Razr Fold分別搭載5,000mAh和6,000mAh矽碳電池。

articles.title: The wait is almost over: Motorola Razr Fold is coming to the US next month
articles.summary: TL;DR The Razr Fold will be available for pre-order at Best Buy and on Motorola’s website on May 14. It will go on sale in the US on May 21 for $1,899. The foldable will come to T-Mobile, Xfinity Mobile, and Verizon in the coming months. Motorola is launching its next slate of foldables, the 2026 editions of the Razr, Razr Plus, and Razr Ultra . However, this year is a little different as the company is also introducing a Galaxy Z Fold competitor called the Razr Fold . If you’ve been waiting to get your hands on Motorola’s first attempt at a book-style foldable, here’s when it will be available. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?

articles.title: Motorola’s new Bose-tuned earbuds are finally reaching the US
articles.summary: Credit: C. Scott Brown / Android Authority TL;DR Motorola is officially launching the Moto Buds 2 Plus in the US at $150. Tuned by Bose, the earbuds feature a dual-driver system (11mm drivers and Knowles armatures) with support for Hi-Res Audio and LHDC. When paired with Motorola devices, the buds offer “Moto AI” features including notification summaries, meeting transcriptions, and real-time translation. At MWC 2026, Motorola launched the Moto Buds 2 and Moto Buds 2 Plus , giving users more earbud options from the company. Today, with the launch of the 2026 Razr family, Motorola is also launching the Moto Buds 2 Plus in the US, bringing Bose-branded sound and capable ANC to the North American market. The Moto Buds 2 Plus come with 11mm drivers for full-bodied bass alongside balanced armat
articles.title_zh: Motorola新款Bose調音耳塞終於登陸美國
articles.summary_zh: Motorola正式在美國推出Moto Buds 2 Plus，售價$150。這款由Bose調音的耳塞採用雙驅動系統，支持Hi-Res Audio和LHDC。與Motorola設備配對時提供額外功能。

articles.title: Motorola just copied Samsung Now Brief with Daily Drops

articles.title: Google Photos can now become Cher’s wardrobe planner from Clueless
articles.summary: TL;DR Google Photos is adding a wardrobe-planning mode that works off pictures you’ve taken of your clothing We first spotted development work on the tool earlier this month. After first debuting on Android devices, including the new Moto Razr lineup, Google plans to extend the feature to iOS users. One of the more useful tricks AI has enabled involves tracking down new clothing. If we see someone wearing something we like online, tools like Circle to Search make it easy to not just find where we can buy the garment, but also preview how it might look on someone like us. That’s great for new acquisitions, but what do we do if we’re having trouble picking out an outfit from our existing wardrobe? Google Photos might have just the solution. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority

Moto G87 official images The Moto G87 is powered by MediaTek's Dimensity 6400 SoC, paired with up to 12GB of RAM. The phone has a 6.78-inch "Extreme AMOLED" display with "1.5K" resolution, a 120Hz refresh rate, 5,000-nit peak brightness, and Gorilla Glass 7i on...

articles.title: Here's when the OnePlus Nord CE6 and OnePlus Nord CE6 Lite go on sale
articles.summary: OnePlus is launching the Nord CE6 and Nord CE6 Lite in India on May 7 at 12 PM local time. The OnePlus Nord CE6 will have its first sale on May 8 at 12 PM local time, while the Nord CE6 Lite will become available on May 12 at 12 PM. Both of them will be offered through Amazon India, the official OnePlus India website, OnePlus stores, and other offline retail outlets in the country. OnePlus has already revealed that the Nord CE6 is powered by the Snapdragon 7s Gen 4 SoC...

articles.title: Oppo Reno16 Pro global variant’s key specs and launch timeline tipped
articles.summary: Last week, a tipster revealed the key specifications of the China-bound Oppo Reno16 Pro. Now, another source has shared details about the global variant, including its key specs and expected launch timeline. Oppo Reno15 Pro (global) The tipster claims that the phone will come with a 6.32-inch OLED display, similar to its predecessor. It is said to offer a glass and aluminum build. The Reno16 Pro...

articles.title: Laptops sold in the EU now required to ship with USB-C charging
articles.summary: The European Union’s common charger directive came into effect back in December of 2024 and required most new portable electronic devices to ship with a unified USB-C connector. Back then, the EU Commission extended the transition for laptop manufacturers by an extra 16 months, and the grace period officially expired yesterday, April 28. This means that all new laptops sold in the European Union are now required by law to feature at least one USB-C port for charging. The directive specifies that all laptops with a 100W or lower power rating are required to transition to USB-C charging....
articles.title_zh: 在歐盟銷售的筆記本電腦現在必須配備USB-C充電

Honor markets 35 days of battery life, which, if true, will offer one of the longest battery lives in the industry, falling short only of certain Garmin smartwatches. In addition to...

articles.title: Brazil's Nicnet taps Aprecomm to optimize its fiber gateways
articles.summary: Nicnet, a fiber operator in Brazil, is deploying Aprecomm's AI-assisted customer experience and customer premises equipment management tech, including its Wi-Fi optimization software, on broadband gateways. #pressrelease

articles.title: Optimum eyes virtualization to bridge the FTTP-HFC reliability gap
articles.summary: Optimum has teamed with Harmonic for its first large-scale deployment of a virtual CMTS. 'Virtualization could level the playing field' between HFC and FTTP, says COO Nate Edwards.

articles.title: How integrated sensing can mitigate drone incursions by addressing low-altitude blindness

articles.summary_zh: Ericsson Federal 執行長表示，整合感測可以保護現有國防基礎設施，並推動未來無人機經濟發展。

articles.title: Cut AI token usage by 96%? Here’s how AWS Strands Agents does it.
articles.summary: For this episode of The New Stack Makers , I sat down with AWS developer advocate Morgan Willis to talk about Strands Agents , the company’s open source agentic framework, which has seen over 14 million downloads since it launched just under a year ago. Willis brought a hands-on demo built around a simple accounting API to show what building with Strands looks like in practice. The demo walks through three iterations of the same task: looking up the latest invoice for a customer. First, Willis mapped each API endpoint directly to an agent tool, the way most developers would by default. The agent needed five chained API calls and burned roughly 52,000 tokens. Then she swapped in intent-based tools that are built around an outcome rather than a data operation. With the same query, gett
articles.title_zh: 如何通過 AWS Strands Agents 將 AI token 使用量減少 96%?
articles.summary_zh: 在本集 The New Stack Makers 節目中,AWS 開發者倡導者 Morgan Willis 分享了 Strands Agents 這款開源代理框架如何在推出不到一年的時間內達到超過 1400 萬次下載,並展示了實際應用演示。

articles.title: Anaconda acquires Outerbounds to rein in the buggy code AI agents keep shipping
articles.summary: Anaconda , which provides an AI-native dev platform, is acquiring Outerbounds , the company behind Metaflow , an open source AI/ML orchestration framework that originated at Netflix , the companies announced on Tuesday. The deal aims to provide enterprise teams with a governed path from AI experimentation to production. This also makes Anaconda a full-stack platform for AI-native development , the company says. In addition, this move signals a broader inflection point in how enterprise software is built. AI-generated code now accounts for nearly half of all new code in enterprise pipelines, Anaconda indicates based on analysis. Yet that code produces 1.7 times as many defects as human-written code, and 80% of dependencies recommended by AI coding assistants pose known securi
articles.title_zh: Anaconda 收購 Outerbounds,遏制 AI 代理程式中的缺陷代碼
articles.summary_zh: 提供 AI 原生開發平台的 Anaconda 宣布收購 Netflix 開源 AI/ML 編排框架 Metaflow 的幕後公司 Outerbounds,旨在為企業團隊提供從 AI 實驗到生產的受控路徑。

articles.title: How Elon Musk Squeezed OpenAI: They 'Are Gonna Want to Kill Me’
articles.summary: Tensions flared on the third day of trial in Musk v. Altman as OpenAI’s lawyers cross-examined Musk.
articles.title_zh: Elon Musk 如何向 OpenAI 施壓：他們「會想殺了我」
articles.summary_zh: 在 Musk 訴 Altman 案件的第三天，法庭上緊張局勢升級，OpenAI 的律師對 Musk 進行了交叉詢問。

articles.title: Emergency First Responders Say Waymos Are Getting Worse
articles.summary: “I believe the technology was deployed too quickly in too vast amounts, with hundreds of vehicles, when it wasn’t really ready,” one police official told federal regulators last month.
articles.title_zh: 應急救援人員表示 Waymo 自駕車變得更糟
articles.summary_zh: 一位警察官員上月向聯邦監管機構表示，該技術部署得太快，數量太龐大，數百輛車並未真正準備好。

articles.title: Taylor Swift Wants to Trademark Her Likeness. These TikTok Deepfake Ads Show Why

articles.title: Female Looksmaxxer Alorah Ziva Is Suing Clavicular for Alleged Battery

articles.title: Sanctioned Chinese AI Firm SenseTime Releases Image Model Built for Speed

articles.title: Motorola’s New Razr Folding Phones Command a Higher Price With Few Upgrades

articles.title: Kosovo’s Tech Boom Is Saving Its Young People from Unemployment
articles.summary: From the rooftop terrace of Kosovo’s innovation center, Shpend Lila pointed out a red-brick building on a recent weekday morning. Originally the headquarters of a local publishing agency, the modernist structure was Pristina’s tallest for decades. Today, it is dwarfed by high-rises housing a growing mix of tech companies — including SPEEEX, a business processing outsource firm on track to become the country’s first unicorn.
articles.title_zh: 科索沃科技繁榮正在拯救年輕人免於失業
articles.summary_zh: 在科索沃創新中心的屋頂露台上，Shpend Lila 在最近一個工作日上午指出了一棟紅磚建築，這座現代主義建築曾是普里什蒂納最高的建築，如今被容納不斷增長企業的高樓所矮化。

articles.title: Anthropic Plan to Expand Mythos Access Is Opposed by White House
articles.summary: The White House opposes a plan by Anthropic PBC to expand access to its Mythos AI model, an administration official said Wednesday night.
articles.title_zh: Anthropic 擴展 Mythos 訪問計劃遭白宮反對
articles.summary_zh: 白宮周三晚間反對 Anthropic PBC 擴展其 Mythos AI 模型訪問權限的計劃。

articles.title: Samsung’s Chip Profit Soars 48-Fold Due to AI Spending Spree
articles.summary: Samsung Electronics Co.’s semiconductor arm brought in historic profit over the March quarter, beating expectations with a 48-fold jump as AI data center orders delivered hefty margins.
articles.title_zh: 三星芯片利潤因 AI 支出狂潮飆升 48 倍
articles.summary_zh: 三星電子公司半導體部門在第一季度取得歷史性利潤，受 AI 數據中心訂單推動利潤增長 48 倍，遠超預期。

articles.title: Mphasis CEO on Business Strategy, AI Investments
articles.summary: Nitin Rakesh, CEO at Indian IT firm Mphasis, discusses the company's business strategy and its investments in AI. He speaks with Haidi Stroud-Watts on Bloomberg: The Asia Trade. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Mphasis CEO 談論業務戰略和 AI 投資
articles.summary_zh: 印度 IT 公司 Mphasis 的首席執行官 Nitin Rakesh 討論了公司的業務戰略及其在 AI 方面的投資。

articles.title: SoftBank’s $40 Billion Loan for OpenAI Stake Draws More Banks
articles.summary: Banks that recently signed a $40 billion bridge loan with SoftBank Group Corp. for its investment in US tech giant OpenAI have attracted more lenders to the deal in syndication, people familiar with the matter said.
articles.title_zh: SoftBank 為 OpenAI 股權的 400 億美元貸款吸引更多銀行加入

articles.title: Musk Put on Defensive Over His Financial Commitment to OpenAI
articles.summary: Elon Musk became visibly irritated on the witness stand Wednesday as an attorney for OpenAI questioned whether the billionaire backed off his financial commitment to the startup in its early years.
articles.title_zh: Musk 在其對 OpenAI 的財務承諾問題上陷入困境
articles.summary_zh: 周三，Elon Musk 在作證時變得明顯激怒，因為 OpenAI 的一名律師質疑這位億萬富翁在初期是否放棄了對該初創公司的財務承諾。

articles.title: AI-Led Rally in Asia Stocks Masks Deeper Damage from Iran War
articles.summary: Asia’s artificial intelligence-fueled rally is masking signs of strain, with gains in tech names overshadowing the impact of the US-Iran war on the broader market.
articles.title_zh: 亞洲股票中的 AI 引領漲勢掩蓋了伊朗戰爭更深層的損害

articles.title: Samsung, SK Hynix Payouts to Fuel Rate Hikes, Mirae Asset Says
articles.summary: The extraordinary wealth generated from South Korean chipmakers will drive spending and inflation, spurring the nation’s central bank to raise interest rates at least three times over the coming year, according to Mirae Asset Global Investments.
articles.title_zh: 三星和 SK 海力士的派息將推高利率，Mirae Asset 表示
articles.summary_zh: 根據 Mirae Asset Global Investments 的分析，南韓芯片製造商產生的非凡財富將推動支出和通脹增加，促使該國央行在未來一年至少三次提高利率。

articles.title: OpenAI Meets Key AI Computing Capacity Goal Ahead of Schedule
articles.summary: OpenAI has met a key milestone for securing AI capacity in the US several years ahead of schedule, boosting the startup’s ambitious plans for data center expansion.
articles.title_zh: OpenAI 提前實現關鍵 AI 計算容量目標
articles.summary_zh: OpenAI 已提前數年實現在美國確保 AI 計算容量的關鍵里程碑，促進該初創公司雄心勃勃的數據中心擴張計劃。

articles.title: Startup Bringing Brains to AI Aims for $2.5 Billion Valuation
articles.summary: Thomas Reardon, who led the work on Meta Platforms Inc.’s Neural Band, is raising funds for a new startup called Flourish to develop energy-efficient artificial intelligence, according to people familiar with the matter.
articles.title_zh: 初創公司為 AI 注入大腦，目標估值 25 億美元
articles.summary_zh: 領導 Meta Platforms Inc. 神經帶工作的 Thomas Reardon 正為名叫 Flourish 的新初創公司籌集資金，以開發能效高的人工智能。

articles.title: Alphabet, Amazon Outpace Meta in AI During Earnings Bonanza
articles.summary: A frenzied day of earnings reports offered a glimpse at how some of the world’s biggest tech companies are doing in artificial intelligence. The upshot: Alphabet Inc.’s Google is seeing a clear payoff from its AI spending, while Meta Platforms Inc. is lagging behind.
articles.title_zh: Alphabet 和 Amazon 在財報旺季中超越 Meta 的 AI 表現
articles.summary_zh: 一個繁忙的財報日提供了一瞥世界最大科技公司在人工智能方面的表現：Alphabet Inc. 的 Google 從其 AI 支出中看到明顯回報，而 Meta Platforms Inc. 落後。

articles.title: Fujitsu Falls Most in 11 Years After Forecast Misses Estimates
articles.summary: Fujitsu Ltd. shares fell as much as 14%, the most in 11 years, after the company’s fourth-quarter operating profit and full-year forecast missed analyst estimates.
articles.title_zh: 富士通因預測未達預期而下跌 11 年最大幅度
articles.summary_zh: 富士通公司股價下跌最多 14%（11 年來最大幅度），因該公司第四季度營業利潤和全年預測未達分析師預期。

articles.title: SoftBank to Create and List AI Firm Roze in the US, FT Says
articles.summary: SoftBank Group Corp. plans to establish and float a standalone AI robotics and data center company called Roze in the US, the Financial Times reported, citing unidentified people familiar with the matter.
articles.title_zh: SoftBank 計劃在美國創建並上市 AI 公司 Roze，據英國《金融時報》報導
articles.summary_zh: SoftBank Group Corp. 計劃在美國建立並上市一家獨立 AI 機器人和數據中心公司 Roze，據知情人士向《金融時報》透露。

articles.title: Microsoft Projects ‘Modest’ Cloud Acceleration Amid AI Jitters
articles.summary: Microsoft Corp. said cloud computing revenue and spending on AI infrastructure will accelerate this year, a bid to convince investors that its huge bets on artificial intelligence are poised to pay off.
articles.title_zh: Microsoft 在 AI 焦慮中預測雲計算加速「溫和」
articles.summary_zh: Microsoft Corp. 表示雲計算營收和 AI 基礎設施支出將在今年加速，旨在說服投資者其對人工智能的巨額賭注即將獲得回報。

articles.title: Amazon Reports Higher Spending to Fuel Cloud Unit Sales
articles.summary: Amazon.com Inc. is spending at a rapid rate to expand data center capacity to meet the intense demand for artificial intelligence computing power, fueling the fastest quarterly sales growth for its cloud unit in more than three years.
articles.title_zh: Amazon 報告更高支出以推動雲計算部門銷售
articles.summary_zh: Amazon.com Inc. 正在快速支出以擴展數據中心容量以滿足人工智能計算能力的巨大需求，推動其雲計算部門實現三年多來最快的季度銷售增長。

articles.title: Alphabet Sales Beat Estimates on Google Cloud, AI Customers
articles.summary: Alphabet Inc. reported high demand for its cloud and artificial intelligence offerings, boosting shares and giving investors confidence that its unprecedented investments in AI infrastructure will pay off.
articles.title_zh: Alphabet 因 Google Cloud 和 AI 客戶銷售超預期
articles.summary_zh: Alphabet Inc. 報告對其雲和人工智能產品的高需求，推動股價上漲並使投資者相信其對 AI 基礎設施的前所未有投資將獲得回報。

articles.title: Meta Shares Plunge on Rising Concerns Over AI Spending Spree
articles.summary: Meta Platforms Inc. Chief Executive Officer Mark Zuckerberg reignited fears that the historic levels of investment he’s making to catch up in the artificial intelligence race won’t pay off, a prospect that sent shares sliding after the company raised its spending outlook for the year.
articles.title_zh: Meta 股價因 AI 支出狂潮相關擔憂而暴跌
articles.summary_zh: Meta Platforms Inc. 首席執行官 Mark Zuckerberg 重新引發了人們的擔憂，即他為了在人工智能競賽中追趕而進行的歷史性投資水平可能不會有回報，該公司提高了全年支出預期後股價下跌。

articles.title: Qualcomm Rallies on Data Center Inroads, China Recovery
articles.summary: Qualcomm Inc. rallied in late trading after the company said it was making headway in the lucrative data center market and predicted that the China phone industry would bounce back.
articles.title_zh: 高通因數據中心進展和中國復甦而上漲
articles.summary_zh: Qualcomm Inc. 在盤後交易中上漲，該公司表示在利潤豐厚的數據中心市場取得進展，並預測中國手機行業將反彈。

articles.title: Anthropic Considering Funding Offers at Over $900 Billion Value
articles.summary: Anthropic PBC has begun weighing a fresh funding round that would value the artificial intelligence developer at more than $900 billion, according to people familiar with the matter, potentially leapfrogging its longtime rival OpenAI as the world’s most valuable AI startup.
articles.title_zh: Anthropic 考慮融資機會估值超過 9000 億美元
articles.summary_zh: Anthropic PBC 開始評估一輪新融資，將把這家人工智能開發商估值定在 9000 億美元以上，可能超越長期對手 OpenAI 成為全球最有價值的 AI 初創公司。

articles.title: What Latest Tech Earnings Signal for Apple, Nvidia
articles.summary: Daniel Flax, Neuberger senior research analyst, discusses what the latest round of tech earnings could portend for AI companies like Apple, Broadcom and Nvidia on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 最新科技財報對 Apple 和 Nvidia 的預示
articles.summary_zh: Neuberger Berman 高級研究分析師 Daniel Flax 討論了最新一輪科技財報對 Apple、Broadcom 和 Nvidia 等 AI 公司可能預示的影響。

articles.title: Meta Shares Plunge as AI Investments Raise Spending Outlook
articles.summary:
Meta Platforms Inc. shares slid after the company raised its spending outlook for the year, reigniting fears that the historic levels of investment it’s making to build artificial intelligence models won’t pay off.
The social-media giant projected full-year capital expenditures between $125 billion and $145 billion, far exceeding analysts’ estimates and marking a roughly 7.4% increase from what the company had previously projected. The company is dealing with “higher component pricing” and additional data center costs, Chief Financial Officer Susan Li said in a statement. Bloomberg's Kurt Wagner joins to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Meta 股價因 AI 投資提高支出預期而暴跌
articles.summary_zh: Meta Platforms Inc. 股價下跌，因該公司提高了全年支出預期，重新引發了人們的擔憂，即其為構建人工智能模型而進行的歷史性投資水平可能不會有回報。

articles.title: The 10 Billion Startup Training AI To Do Your Job
articles.summary: San Francisco tech startup, Mercor, is hiring high-skilled workers for a massive undertaking: teaching AI how to do their jobs. On today’s Big Take podcast, reporter Tom Foster and host Sarah Holder break down how Mercor’s college-dropout founders built a $10 billion company aimed at automating the white-collar world. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 100 億美元初創公司訓練 AI 做你的工作
articles.summary_zh: 舊金山科技初創公司 Mercor 正在招聘高技能工人從事一項龐大任務：教 AI 如何做他們的工作。

articles.title: Luria Sees Good Signs Ahead for Big Tech After Earnings
articles.summary: DA Davidson Managing Director Gil Luria offers his key takeaways on earnings from Amazon, Microsoft and Meta Platforms. He speaks on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Luria 在財報後看到大科技股的好跡象
articles.summary_zh: DA Davidson 董事總經理 Gil Luria 分享了他對 Amazon、Microsoft 和 Meta Platforms 財報的主要見解。

articles.title: US House Probes Airbnb, Anysphere’s Use of Chinese AI Models
articles.summary: House Republicans are investigating American technology companies’ use of Chinese artificial intelligence models, part of a broader push by Congress to limit US national security risks and to counter Beijing in the global AI race.
articles.title_zh: 美國眾議院調查 Airbnb 和 Anysphere 使用中國 AI 模型
articles.summary_zh: 眾議院共和黨人正在調查美國科技公司對中國人工智能模型的使用，這是國會限制美國國家安全風險並在全球 AI 競賽中對抗北京的更廣泛推動的一部分。

articles.title: Stripe’s Push to Bring AI to Payments, Commerce
articles.summary: Stripe announced several new AI tools Wednesday, including a new partnership with Google, aimed at building AI tools for payments and commerce. Stripe President and co-founder John Collison discusses the company’s AI strategy with Bloomberg Tech's Ed Ludlow. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Stripe 推進將 AI 應用於支付和商務
articles.summary_zh: Stripe 宣布推出多項新 AI 工具，包括與 Google 的新合作夥伴關係，旨在為支付和商務領域開發 AI 工具。Stripe 總裁兼共同創辦人 John Collison 與 Bloomberg Tech 討論公司的 AI 策略。

articles.title: 80 Seconds of Big Tech Earnings To Set Market’s Fate | Bloomberg Tech 4/29/2026
articles.summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss expectations for big tech earnings as investors prepare for Microsoft, Meta, Google, and Amazon to report earnings after the market closes. Plus, SoFi CEO Anthony Noto discusses investors' reaction to the financial services company’s earnings as its shares fall. And, Elon Musk continues testifying in his suit against OpenAI over the startup's pivot from a charity to a for-profit business. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 80 秒掌握大科技公司業績決定市場走向 | Bloomberg Tech 4/29/2026
articles.summary_zh: Bloomberg 探討投資者對 Microsoft、Meta、Google 和 Amazon 業績發佈的期待，並報導 SoFi 執行長 Anthony Noto 對該金融服務公司業績的市場反應評論。

articles.title: SoFi Shares Fall on Higher-Than-Expected Expenses
articles.summary: SoFi shares fell after the company released its quarterly results. SoFi CEO Anthony Noto says investors appear to be reading its decision to maintain its full-year guidance as a sign of uncertainty. Noto speaks with Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: SoFi 股價因支出高於預期而下跌
articles.summary_zh: SoFi 公佈季度業績後股價下跌，執行長 Anthony Noto 表示投資者將公司維持全年指引的決定視為不確定性的信號。

articles.title: Meta’s Need for Gas Power Boosts Entergy Spending by $14 Billion
articles.summary: US utility Entergy Corp. boosted its four-year capital spending plan by nearly a third to $57 billion, mainly to build natural gas-fired power plants for Meta Platforms Inc.’s massive data center development in northern Louisiana.
articles.title_zh: Meta 對天然氣電力的需求推升 Entergy 支出 140 億美元
articles.summary_zh: 美國公用事業公司 Entergy Corp. 將四年資本支出計畫增加近三分之一至 570 億美元，主要用於在路易斯安那州北部為 Meta Platforms 的大規模數據中心開發建設天然氣發電廠。

articles.title: Apple to Add AI-Powered Photo-Editing Tools
articles.summary: Apple is planning a major overhaul of the built-in photo-editing features, powered by its Apple Intelligence platform, according to people familiar with the plans. Bloomberg's Mark Gurman joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Apple 將添加 AI 驅動的照片編輯工具
articles.summary_zh: Apple 計畫由 Apple Intelligence 平台驅動的內建照片編輯功能進行重大改革。Bloomberg 的 Mark Gurman 在 "Bloomberg Tech" 節目中討論此計畫。

articles.title: ABC can beat Trump FCC's license threat if owner Disney is willing to fight
articles.summary: Disney will have the law on its side in its fight against the unusual broadcast license review ordered yesterday by the Federal Communications Commission, legal experts say. In 1996, Congress made it a lot harder for the FCC to take away a broadcast license, even when it's up for renewal. "Since the NAB [National Association of Broadcasters] got an amendment in the 1996 Telecommunications Act, denying renewal to a broadcaster faces an almost insurmountable burden," Andrew Jay Schwartzman, senior counselor of the Benton Institute for Broadband & Society, told Ars this week. The Telecommunications Act of 1996 was a major update to the Communications Act, the 1934 law that established the FCC and provides the agency with its legal authority. Read full article Comments
articles.title_zh: 若 Disney 願意對抗，ABC 可克服 Trump FCC 的執照威脅
articles.summary_zh: 法律專家表示 Disney 在對抗美國聯邦通訊委員會異常廣播執照審查時具有法律優勢。1996 年國會大幅提高了 FCC 撤銷廣播執照的難度。

articles.title: OpenAI Codex system prompt includes explicit directive to "never talk about goblins"
articles.summary: The system prompt for OpenAI's Codex CLI contains a perplexing and repeated warning for the most recent GPT model to "never talk about goblins, gremlins, raccoons, trolls, ogres, pigeons, or other animals or creatures unless it is absolutely and unambiguously relevant to the user's query." The explicit operational warning was made public last week as part of the latest open source code for Codex CLI that OpenAI posted on GitHub . The prohibition is repeated twice in a 3,500-plus word set of "base instructions" for the recently released GPT-5.5, alongside more anodyne reminders not to "use emojis or em dashes unless explicitly instructed" and to "never use destructive commands like 'git reset --hard' or 'git checkout --' unless the user has clearly asked for that operation." Separate system
articles.title_zh: OpenAI Codex 系統提示詞包含明確指令要求「永遠不要談論 goblins」
articles.summary_zh: OpenAI 的 Codex CLI 系統提示詞包含重複警告，指示最新 GPT 模型「永遠不要談論 goblins、gremlins、raccoons 等生物，除非與用戶查詢明確相關」。

articles.title: Howdy's dated $3/month ad-free streaming service said to have 1M subscribers
articles.summary: Six months after its launch, research firm Antenna estimates that the Howdy streaming service has more than 1 million subscribers. Roku debuted Howdy in August. The subscription video-on-demand (SVOD) service is $3 per month and doesn't have commercials. In an announcement today, Antenna estimated that almost 300,000 people signed up for Howdy in August and that the service gained 100,000 subscribers in each subsequent month. Read full article Comments
articles.title_zh: Howdy 過時的每月 3 美元無廣告串流服務據稱擁有 100 萬訂戶
articles.summary_zh: 推出六個月後，研究公司 Antenna 估計 Howdy 串流服務擁有超過 100 萬訂戶。Roku 於 8 月推出 Howdy，這項訂購視頻點播服務每月 3 美元且無廣告。

articles.title: New Sam Bankman-Fried trial would be huge waste of court’s time, judge says
articles.summary: In an order denying Sam Bankman-Fried's request for a new trial, a judge accused the disgraced FTX founder of wasting precious court resources on wild conspiracies. To the judge, the motion seemed like a last-ditch attempt to give himself a MAGA makeover that the Trump administration absolutely wasn't buying . Bankman-Fried was sentenced to 25 years in prison in 2024 for "masterminding one of the largest financial frauds in American history," US District Judge Lewis Kaplan wrote in his order. He was convicted on all charges, including wire fraud, conspiracy to commit securities fraud, commodities fraud, and money laundering. There is already an appeal pending in another court, the judge noted. But Bankman-Fried filed a separate motion for a new trial, claiming that there were "newly discov
articles.title_zh: 新的 Sam Bankman-Fried 審判將浪費法院時間，法官表示
articles.summary_zh: 法官在駁回 Sam Bankman-Fried 新審判請求時，指責這位失勢的 FTX 創辦人浪費寶貴的法院資源進行荒謬陰謀論。法官認為此動議是最後的絕望嘗試，試圖進行 MAGA 形象改造。

articles.title: Drone strikes on data centers spook Big Tech, halting Middle East projects
articles.summary: A data center developer has paused all Middle East project investments after one of its facilities was damaged by an Iranian missile or drone attack. The decision comes as the Iran war is forcing Silicon Valley investors and tech companies to rethink a trillion-dollar plan to build more AI and cloud data centers in Gulf countries. The damaged data center is owned by Pure Data Centre Group, a London-based company that is operating or developing more than 1 gigawatt of data center capacity across Europe, the Middle East, and Asia. “No one’s going to run into a burning building, so to speak,” Pure DC CEO Gary Wojtaszek told CNBC . “No one’s going to put in new additional capital at scale to do anything until everything settles down." Data center developers are already eating the costs of unin
articles.title_zh: 數據中心無人機襲擊令大科技公司不安，中東項目暫停
articles.summary_zh: 一家數據中心開發商在其設施遭受伊朗飛彈或無人機襲擊後暫停所有中東項目投資。此決定反映伊朗戰爭迫使矽谷投資者和科技公司重新考慮價值數兆美元的 AI 和雲基礎設施建設計畫。

articles.title: Motorola reveals 2026 Razr lineup with modest upgrades and higher prices
articles.summary: Motorola is crazy about foldables. With each passing year, the company has beefed up its folding phone lineup, and in 2026, there will be four devices launching on May 21. At the top end is the company's first tablet-style foldable, the Razr Fold. Below that, Motorola will again offer three flip-style foldables: the Razr Ultra, Razr+, and Razr. These phones get a few modest upgrades over last year's phones , along with price increases. Motorola is unfortunately not immune to the rising cost of components. Specs at a glance: 2026 Motorola Razr series Razr 2026 ($800) Razr+ 2026 ($1,100) Razr Ultra 2026 ($1,500) Razr Fold ($1,900) SoC MediaTek Dimensity 7450X Snapdragon 8s Gen 3 Snapdragon 8 Elite "Pro" Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 Memory 8GB 12GB 16GB 16GB Storage 128GB 256GB 512GB 512GB Displa
articles.title_zh: Motorola 推出 2026 年 Razr 系列，小幅升級但價格上漲
articles.summary_zh: Motorola 對可折疊手機充滿熱情，並在 2026 年推出四款設備（5 月 21 日推出）。頂級產品是公司首款平板式可折疊手機 Razr Fold，下方還有三款翻蓋式機型。

articles.title: Nvidia fixes the 8GB RAM problem with one of its GPUs—if you can pay for it
articles.summary: Whether you're a gamer trying to play recent AAA titles at high resolutions and maxed-out settings or an AI enthusiast trying to run models locally, we've reached the point where a GPU with 8GB of video memory is a pretty limiting bottleneck. But because of ongoing memory shortages and price spikes, it's also a uniquely bad time for GPU makers to attempt to fix this problem— rumors suggested that a RAM-boosting mid-generation "Super" refresh for Nvidia's RTX 50-series GPUs was quietly delayed or canceled earlier this year, at least in part because of memory costs. One of Nvidia's GPUs is getting a RAM upgrade, according to an announcement the company buried at the bottom of a blog post about a routine Game Ready driver update. The laptop version of the GeForce RTX 5070 is getting a bump fr
articles.title_zh: Nvidia 用其中一款 GPU 解決 8GB 記憶體問題—如果你能付得起的話
articles.summary_zh: 對於遊戲玩家以高解析度和最高設定執行最新 AAA 遊戲或 AI 愛好者在本地執行模型來說，8GB 顯示記憶體已成為明顯的瓶頸。但由於持續的記憶體短缺和價格上漲，配備更大容量記憶體的 GPU 價格昂貴。

articles.title: Professional school grads from diverse classes get higher salaries
articles.summary: Even before the Trump administration went to war against DEI and attempts to address historical discrimination, diversity efforts in the US were controversial. A pivotal moment came in 2023, when the Supreme Court ruled that race-based affirmative action programs violated the Constitution. The decision partly rested on universities' inability to clearly measure the benefits of diverse student bodies and the lack of defined standards to determine when equity had been achieved and such programs should end. A new paper highlights the uncertainty. "Learning theory argues that racial diversity promotes student learning, which should increase salaries," its authors write. "However, well-documented racial wage discrimination indicates that higher racial diversity should decrease salaries." But th
articles.title_zh: 來自多元背景的專業學校畢業生獲得更高薪資
articles.summary_zh: 在 Trump 政府對抗 DEI 之前，美國的多元化努力一直備受爭議。2023 年最高法院裁定基於種族的平權行動違憲，標誌了關鍵轉折點。

articles.title: cPanel修補重大身分驗證漏洞，未更新可能導致攻擊者接管主機
articles.summary: 網站主機管理平臺廠商cPanel近日發布資安公告，揭露旗下管理軟體cPanel及WHM（WebHost Manager）存在重大漏洞，攻擊者能在不需通過身分驗證的狀況下，即可取得管理介面存取權限，進而控制主機，由於這兩款軟體是網站主機環境常用的Linux伺服器管理與控制面板工具，因此這項漏洞的影響範圍格外廣泛，用戶必須立即更新至已修補版本。

articles.title: Meta營收成長33%，AI資本支出上調至1450億美元
articles.summary: Meta週三（4/29）公布2026年第一季財報，該季Meta創下563.11億美元的營收，比去年同期成長33%，淨收入為268億美元，成長61%，每股盈餘為10.44美元。當天Meta亦將2026年的資本支出從原本預測的1,150~1,350億美元，調高至1,250~1,450億美元。財報出爐後，Meta盤後股價下滑6.37%，跌至626.5美元。

articles.title: 澳洲新法擬以徵稅為手段，催Google、Meta、TikTok支付新聞網站授權費
articles.summary:
澳洲本週公布新法案，促使Google、Meta和TikTok等大型社群媒體或網路服務業者和新聞媒體議價內容授權費，否則就要支付稅收。
新法案名為新聞媒體議價倡議（News Media Bargaining Incentive，NBI）。NBI法草案旨在修補舊有《新聞媒體議價法（News Media Bargaining Code）》的漏洞，尤其是數位巨頭拒絕與本地媒體協議付費的問題。

articles.title: Alphabet財報出爐，Google Cloud營收成長63%
articles.summary: Alphabet週三（4/29）公布截至3月31日的第一季財報，該季Alphabet創下1,099億美元的營收，成長22%。其中，Google Services營收為896億美元，成長16%，Google Cloud占了200億美元，成長63%，淨收入達626億美元，成長81%，每股盈餘為5.11美元。當天Alphabet盤後股價上揚6.96%，漲至371.5美元。

articles.summary:

articles.title: Gemini服務現可直接生成PDF、Word、Excel及Google Docs等檔案
articles.summary:
Google週三（4/29）宣布，旗下生成式AI服務Gemini現在已可直接生成檔案，從PDF、Word、Excel到Google Docs等。
過去使用者要利用Gemini建立檔案時，必須先請它生成內容或表格，使用者再複製至特定工具中並排版，現在Gemini則可直接幫使用者將內容轉為標準檔案格式。

articles.title: Crucial Taiwan undersea cable severed by old shipwreck — backup microwave communications activated to keep population connected
articles.summary: Bad weather has caused a shipwreck to shift from its original position on the seafloor, severing a crucial undersea link between Dongyin and Beigan islands. These two islands are strategically located near the Chinese coast and the northern mouth of the Taiwan Strait and reportedly have a heavy military presence of Taiwanese troops.

articles.title: Transforming DRC Closure At Advanced Nodes
articles.summary: If you’re working on SoCs at 2 nm or below, you know DRC is a different beast these days. Early in the design, it’s common for DRC runs to dump hundreds of millions—or even billions—of violations at your feet. And that’s when everything is changing fast: block interfaces aren’t fixed and constraints are shifting with every new iteration. Making sense of these massive result sets, figuring out what to fix first and keeping everyone coordinated is no small task. The old way—waiting for every check to finish before you can even start looking at results—just doesn’t cut it anymore. When analysis only starts after a long, overnight run, teams waste precious time in a cycle of “run, then debug, then re-run” with bottlenecks at every stage. So what’s the answer? Getting closure at advanced nodes
articles.title_zh: 在先進工藝節點實現 DRC 閉合
articles.summary_zh: 在 2 奈米或以下工藝節點開發 SoC 時，DRC 成為不同的挑戰。在設計初期，DRC 執行通常會產生數億甚至數十億的違規。

articles.title: Creating Agentic EDA Methodologies
articles.summary: Key takeaways Agentic methodologies need to be able to reason across multiple data formats and abstractions. It is not clear how much data from previous designs is useful in new designs. Standards may help, but the lack of them may only impact cost. The relationship between tools and methodologies is bidirectional. Tools enable methodologies, and methodologies are dependent on tool features and the data they provide. But there are very few architectural-level tools in the industry today, which will make it more difficult to create complete agentic flows. Much of the first round of AI within EDA concentrated on a single tool, and therefore only concerned itself with one type of data at one level of abstraction. It did not have to think about external tools and data interoperability. (See re
articles.title_zh: 創建智能 EDA 方法論
articles.summary_zh: 智能方法論需要能夠跨多種資料格式和抽象層進行推理；先前設計資料在新設計中的實用程度不明確；標準可能有幫助，但缺乏標準可能只影響成本。

articles.title: Foundry Capacity Is Limiting Who Competes At Leading Edge Nodes
articles.summary: Key Takeaways: Leading-edge node access is increasingly reserved for hyperscalers, squeezing smaller chip developers. Chiplets and advanced packaging offer a path forward, but raise cost, complexity, and risk — especially for smaller teams. Chip architecture is now driven as much by capacity, yield, and economics as by technical goals. The benefits of device scaling are slowing, but the race to the next nodes continues unabated. Yet it’s unclear how many companies will be able to take advantage of the latest technology nodes, at least in the short term, because large systems companies are consuming nearly all the available capacity. Leading-edge nodes provide the highest profit margins for foundries, and demand currently exceeds supply by a wide margin. The shift to nanosheets at 2nm
articles.title_zh: 代工廠產能限制誰能在先進工藝節點競爭
articles.summary_zh: 先進工藝節點訪問權日益被超大型雲端廠商保留，擠壓較小晶片開發商；晶片讓和先進封裝提供了出路，但提高了成本、複雜性和風險，尤其對小型團隊。

articles.title: Unlocking High-Speed Serial Link Signal Integrity With AMI Model
articles.summary: As the demand for faster data rates in high-speed interfaces such as PCIe, USB, and DDR continues to escalate, maintaining signal integrity has become a significant challenge for engineers. Traditional SPICE-based simulations, while precise, often suffer from computational intensity, making it impractical to model the intricate behavior of high-speed signals across millions of bits. This is where the Algorithmic Modeling Interface (AMI) comes into play—a revolutionary approach that promises both efficiency and accuracy in simulating high-speed serial links. For example, consider designing a PCIe Gen5 link at 32 GT/s. Without proper equalization, high-frequency losses can cause eye closure, resulting in increased bit error rates (BER). AMI models solve this by implementing Feed-Forward Equa
articles.title_zh: 利用 AMI 模型解鎖高速序列連結信號完整性
articles.summary_zh: 隨著 PCIe、USB 和 DDR 等高速介面更快資料率的需求不斷增加，維護信號完整性對工程師成為重大挑戰，傳統 SPICE 模擬雖然精確但計算密集。

articles.title: Facilitating Complex SoC Design Through Automation And Integration
articles.summary: The design demands of today’s highly advanced system-on-chip (SoC) devices have long outgrown the capabilities of manual workflows to manage them effectively. As these chips become more complex, only sophisticated, high-performance, and scalable automation can ensure that every component of the SoC functions seamlessly. The SoC integration challenge A fundamental aspect of SoC design is the integration of intellectual property (IP), typically delivered as reusable functional blocks. Many IPs, including central processing units, graphics processing units, and memory subsystems and controllers, are sourced from trusted third-party vendors. In addition, internally developed IP cores are also used. Customizing these IPs creates differentiation for the SoC relative to competing designs. An exam
articles.title_zh: 透過自動化和整合促進複雜 SoC 設計
articles.summary_zh: 當今高度先進 SoC 裝置的設計需求早已超出手動工作流程有效管理的能力。隨著晶片變得更複雜，只有精密、高效能、可擴展的自動化才能確保 SoC 的每個組件得到妥善管理。

articles.title: How To Streamline Your Advanced Package Interconnect Designs
articles.summary: Monolithic system-on-chip (SoC) designs was once a popular choice. However, they face significant constraints in the era of AI. By forcing all chip functions into a single die and process node, they reduce engineering, manufacturing, and design cost flexibility. In contrast, the multi-die nature of chiplets enables different SoC functions to be designed and verified independently and fabricated on a cost-effective process node. What are the market drivers behind chiplets? Figure 1. Monolithic vs. chiplet-based chip designs. Compared to monolithic SoCs, chiplet-based SoCs confer several benefits: better energy efficiency and lower power consumption,eg. pJ/bit more cost-effective using mix-and-match process node better thermal performance higher fabrication yields heterogeneous multi-vendor
articles.title_zh: 如何簡化您的先進封裝互連設計
articles.summary_zh: 單晶 SoC 設計曾經流行，但在 AI 時代面臨重大限制。多晶片設計相比之下提供更大的工程、製造和設計成本靈活性。

articles.title: Solving Clock Signal Integrity And Jitter Issues
articles.summary: A recent blog post discussed the challenges of clock signal integrity and clock jitter in deep submicron semiconductor devices. Nice, clean clock signals are degraded due to many factors, including noise in the power delivery network (PDN). Timing variation due to clock jitter is also a serious issue, especially for chips operating at low voltage with high frequencies. The impact due to clock jitter and compromised clock signal integrity can be severe, including metastability, races, long paths, and reduced maximum operating clock frequency (Fmax). Traditional simulations lack the subtle understanding of clocking requirements to detect all these issues before chips are fabricated. They run for days, or even weeks, and cannot handle the complete clock network of a large chip. A dedicated cl
articles.title_zh: 解決時脈信號完整性和抖動問題
articles.summary_zh: 一篇近期部落格文章討論了深奈米級半導體裝置中時脈信號完整性和時脈抖動的挑戰，乾淨的時脈信號因 PDN 雜訊等多個因素而降級。

articles.title: From Standards To Systems: The Chiplet Era On Arm
articles.summary: For three decades, Arm didn’t just participate in industry transformation — it redefined it. From mobile to cloud to automotive, Arm’s architecture and the AMBA ecosystem have become the backbone of scalable compute. Now the industry faces its next structural shift: The era of monolithic SoCs is tapering and giving way to the era of chiplet systems. While complex SoCs are going to be continually needed, the complexity and the capacity for a single die (reticle limit) is already well past meeting system needs. As a result, performance, latency and power requirements drive these advanced systems to incorporate both complex SoCs and chiplet-based architectures that scale into much larger systems. Arm is now building an ecosystem around the Arm Chiplet Specification Architecture (ACSA), and th
articles.title_zh: 從標準到系統：Arm 上的晶片讓時代
articles.summary_zh: 三十年來，Arm 不僅參與了業界轉型，更重新定義了它。從行動到雲到汽車，Arm 架構和 AMBA 生態系已成為可擴展運算的骨幹。現在業界面臨下一個結構性轉變：單晶 SoC 時代即將結束。

articles.title: NoC Coherency Challenges Balloon With AI SoCs And Chiplets
articles.summary: Key Takeaways Data movement, congestion, and energy efficiency are key determiners of whether compute is usable. Different processors bring various coherency challenges. For example, a cache-coherent NoC for CPUs is expensive and harder to verify than an I/O-coherent NoC for an accelerator. Designers need to balance top-down performance with bottom-up physical engineering to effectively manage multiple NoCs and sub-NoCs. Moving, managing, and keeping track of data is becoming a much bigger challenge as the amount of data that needs to be processed, stored, and accessed by different processing elements continues to grow. Complex SoCs and multi-die implementations, particularly those involving AI, may contain numerous networks-on-chip (NoCs) to manage and prioritize data movement. They can i
articles.title_zh: NoC 一致性挑戰隨 AI SoC 和晶片讓劇增
articles.summary_zh: 資料移動、擁塞和能效是決定運算可用性的關鍵因素；不同處理器帶來各種一致性挑戰，例如 CPU 的快取一致性 NoC 比加速器的 I/O 一致性 NoC 成本更高且難以驗證。

articles.title: Gemini’s clean chat interface may not stay ad-free for long
articles.summary: Credit: Calvin Wankhede / Android Authority TL;DR Google is now “open” to putting ads in the standalone Gemini app. Google exec Philipp Schindler says ad formats from AI Mode could carry over to Gemini. The Gemini app has long been a refuge from the constant clutter of the modern web . There were no banners or sponsored snippets. Now, that clean interface is about to change. A Google executive suggests the company is not ruling out ways to make money from its flagship AI assistant. During the company’s Q1 2026 earnings call on Wednesday, Google’s chief business officer Philipp Schindler confirmed the company is open to shoving ads into the standalone Gemini app, Business Insider reports. For now, though, Google isn’t rushing. But Schindler added that if an ad format works in Google’s new A
articles.title_zh: Gemini 乾淨聊天界面可能不會長期保持無廣告
articles.summary_zh: Google 高層透露該公司開放考慮在獨立 Gemini 應用中投放廣告；AI Mode 的廣告格式可能移至 Gemini。

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy S27 Ultra reportedly kills 3x telephoto lens in bold camera overhaul
articles.summary: TL;DR The Samsung Galaxy S27 Ultra could reportedly drop the 3x telephoto camera, with tipster Ice Universe claiming a “100% probability,” although this remains an unverified leak for now. The device could also bring a broader camera overhaul, including a next-gen ultrawide sensor, an upgraded main camera, a refreshed selfie camera, support for a variable aperture, and a wider-aperture 5x telephoto lens. Early reactions suggest the removal of the 3x lens might not spark major backlash, as users appear more focused on improvements to the 5x zoom system and overall camera consistency. It’s barely been a couple of months since the Samsung Galaxy S26 series went official, and attention is already drifting toward what’s next. Early leaks surrounding the Samsung Galaxy S27 series are starting to
articles.title_zh: Samsung Galaxy S27 Ultra 據報將大膽捨棄 3 倍變焦鏡頭進行相機大改

articles.title: The next Galaxy Book could be a flagship Aluminium OS laptop powered by One UI 9
articles.summary: TL;DR Samsung is allegedly working on low-end, mid-range, and flagship Galaxy Book laptops powered by Google’s new Aluminium OS. The devices are said to be running One UI 9 based on Android 17, featuring Galaxy AI and an enhanced version of Samsung DeX. Speculatively, an official announcement could arrive as early as Google I/O 2026, with hardware potentially launching later this year. Google has a massive project underway in the form of Aluminium OS , aiming to bring Android to PCs with Gemini at its heart . Aluminium OS is expected to be made available on laptops, detachables, tablets, and PC boxes across price tiers. Now, a new leak has shed light on a key partner for this Aluminium OS, and it’s none other than Samsung. According to Sammobile , Samsung is developing Android-based Galaxy
articles.title_zh: 下一代 Galaxy Book 可能搭載 Aluminium OS，由 One UI 9 驅動
articles.summary_zh: Samsung 據報開發低階、中階與旗艦 Galaxy Book 筆電，搭載 Google 新 Aluminium OS，執行 One UI 9 與 Android 17。

articles.title: Android Auto doesn’t let you dismiss alarms, but Google is working on a solution
articles.summary: Credit: steelbreeze9 TL;DR We discovered that Google is working on a way to let you stop or dismiss alarms via your Android Auto screen. Android Auto doesn’t currently let you stop or dismiss alarms via the car display, forcing you to use your phone. Android Auto is a convenient way to use your phone in the car, giving you access to your apps and a variety of other features. However, one huge limitation is that you can’t actually snooze or dismiss your phone’s alarm from the car screen. Thankfully, we’ve uncovered evidence showing that Google is working on a solution. articles.summary_zh: Google 正開發方案允許使用者透過 Android Auto 螢幕停止或關閉鬧鐘，目前該功能尚不支援。

articles.title: Hey Android, I need reverse parental controls for my mom and dad
articles.summary: Credit: Mishaal Rahman / Android Authority For years now, Android and Google have offered a way to set up parental controls on phones to manage apps, services, and access to information for kids and teenagers before they reach adulthood. It’s a necessary and commendable feature, but it stops short of doing something else that Google needs to be thinking about: parents. My mom and dad are a little past 70 years old, my aunt is in her mid-60s, and so is my mother-in-law. I’m the one managing all their Android phones, remotely, from Paris to Lebanon, and yet, I can’t manage the things I wish I could manage. I don’t want to take their autonomy away, but I always wished there was a way to lock certain things or require my permission to approve them. Let me explain.
articles.title_zh: 嘿 Android，我需要為父母的裝置設定反向家長控制
articles.summary_zh: Android 和 Google 長期提供家長控制功能管理兒童與青少年的應用與資訊，但反向功能仍有缺陷。

articles.title: YouTube Premium is quietly winning the war against ad blockers
articles.summary: Credit: Joe Maring / Android Authority TL;DR YouTube’s Premium subscribers are increasing at a faster rate than ever. The revenue from YouTube Premium has surpassed that from ads on the platform. It appears that YouTube’s strife against ad blockers is finally paying off. YouTube has been toiling hard to keep freeloaders away by inventing new ways to thwart ad blockers and force them to pay for a Premium subscription . Some of those tactics may be working, as suggested by the latest increase in YouTube’s paid subscribers, which the company revealed at a recent event. During its Q1 2026 earnings call earlier this week, Google announced a new milestone for YouTube. CEO Sundar Pichai noted that the company gained 25 million subscribers in the last quarter alone, increasing the total number of
articles.title_zh: YouTube Premium 正悄然贏得對抗廣告攔截器的戰爭
articles.summary_zh: YouTube Premium 訂閱者增速創新高，其收入已超過平台廣告收入，顯示對抗廣告攔截器的努力終見成效。

articles.title: Waterdrop Filter is a smarter choice for everyday wellbeing this Mother’s Day
articles.summary: Credit: Waterdrop Filter Flowers and a nice brunch for Mother’s Day are always great. But if you’re looking for a Mother’s Day gift that keeps giving long after the weekend is over, it might be time for something different. Clean, filtered drinking water might not sound glamorous, but it’s essential, and an excellent option if you’re looking to swap out a one-and-done gesture for something truly useful. Waterdrop Filter is a leading brand in the home water purification space, and right now, it’s running some fantastic Mother’s Day deals on its range of products. Whether mom lives in a house or an apartment, there’s a Waterdrop Filter solution that’ll fit her life. Here’s what you need to know.
articles.title_zh: Waterdrop Filter 是母親節日常健康的更智慧選擇
articles.summary_zh: 鮮花與早午餐向來是母親節好禮，但若尋求長期禮物，乾淨過濾飲用水可能是更實用的選擇。

articles.title: T-Mobile Fiber plans could get a cheaper tier, but with a major catch
articles.summary: TL;DR T-Mobile is reportedly planning to overhaul its fiber home internet plans, potentially introducing a new 300Mbps entry-level plan for $45/month. The reshuffle may involve removing the 500Mbps “middle ground” plan and reducing the 1Gbps plan price to $60/month. New plans might no longer include the five-year price guarantee, potentially allowing for future price increases. Last year, T-Mobile entered the fiber home internet market, and it did so with some tempting launch offers . Early adopters got solid speeds at competitive prices. But as the service expands, that initial value proposition may shift, not entirely in favor of new customers. Up until now, T-Mobile’s fiber lineup has started at 500Mbps for $55 per month with autopay. From there, you could move up to 1Gbps at $65, or 2G
articles.title_zh: T-Mobile Fiber 計畫推出更便宜方案，但有重大限制
articles.summary_zh: T-Mobile 據報計畫改組光纖家用網路方案，可能推出新 300Mbps 入門級方案 $45/月，但可能移除 500Mbps 中級方案。

These features are not yet available and may be officially announced later, potentially at Google I/O. Google has big plans for Gemini’s upcoming App UX 2.0 refresh . articles.title: Google may ruin the Pixel 11’s coolest new feature with AI
articles.summary: Credit: Android Headlines Rumors of the upcoming Pixel 11 and its mysterious new “Pixel Glow” feature are slowly spreading. My colleagues at Android Authority have already spotted a new settings screen in Android 17 beta 4 that lets you control visual feedback alerts on the back of the phone, as well as hints of this new feature in the Pixel Diagnostics and Google app . This is all very exciting. A new light-based hardware addition would be an awesome differentiator for Pixel phones. However, some of our findings leave me scratching my head a little bit. Gemini? AI? Why?

articles.title: Google TV is in trouble, and the latest update only makes it worse
articles.summary: A little over a year ago, I attempted to give up my Apple TV for the Google TV Streamer — hoping to immerse myself in Google’s smart TV OS and fully commit to it. However, just one week later, I was ready to go back. The Google TV Streamer is a fine piece of hardware, but Google TV as a platform has rampant issues with bloatware, advertising, and sponsored content that desperately need to be fixed. Since I last toyed with Google TV, I’ve been waiting and hoping for Google to make meaningful changes here.
articles.title_zh: Google TV 陷入困境，最新更新只會讓情況惡化
articles.summary_zh: 一年多前嘗試以 Google TV Streamer 替代 Apple TV，但一週內即決定回心轉意；Google TV Streamer 硬體不錯，但 Google TV 平台仍有問題。

articles.title: Samsung copied Horizon Lock on Galaxy S26 Ultra, but the original creator has reclaimed it
articles.summary: Credit: Hadlee Simons / Android Authority TL;DR Vivo has brought a Horizon Lock video mode to the X300 Ultra as part of a software update. The feature was previously available on older vivo phones before it went missing in action for a few generations. The update also comes a couple of months after Samsung’s Galaxy S26 Ultra launched with the same mode. Samsung brought a fancy Horizon Lock video stabilization mode to the Galaxy S26 Ultra earlier this year, but it wasn’t the first manufacturer with this feature. The first vivo phone with this feature debuted in 2021, although the company ditched it after a couple of generations. Motorola also embraced the feature in the early 2020s. Now, vivo has quietly revived this option on its latest flagship phone. Vivo recently released an update for
articles.title_zh: Samsung 在 Galaxy S26 Ultra 複製 Horizon Lock，但原創作者已收回該功能

articles.title: Your YouTube home feed could soon look very different on mobile
articles.summary: Credit: Andy Walker / Android Authority TL;DR YouTube is testing dynamic thumbnail and video sizes on mobile, breaking away from the usual uniform grid on the Home feed. The feature is rolling out to both Android and iOS as part of a limited experiment. Thumbnails may look cropped, but YouTube says it isn’t altering original uploads. YouTube is about to look different on your phone. After trying out larger video thumbnails on desktop in early 2025, YouTube is now testing a feature that automatically changes the size of videos and thumbnails on the mobile Home feed. YouTube shared on its support page that this test is now rolling out to both Android and iOS users. The main goal is to make the screen feel more immersive. Since space on mobile screens is limited, YouTube wants to help videos
articles.title_zh: YouTube 首頁動態消息在行動版本上即將面目一新
articles.summary_zh: YouTube 測試行動版動態縮圖與影片尺寸變化，打破傳統首頁統一網格，該實驗正在 Android 與 iOS 上進行。

articles.title: As a Motorola fan, the 2026 Razr lineup is a lazy and expensive mess
articles.summary: As a Motorola fan and flip-phone believer, I should be ecstatic right now. Motorola just announced its 2026 family of Razr foldables , including brand new versions of the Razr, Razr Plus, and Razr Ultra. But looking at the Razr (2026) series, I can’t help but feel disappointed.

articles.title: Got a Fitbit? You might lose years of data if you don’t act soon
articles.summary: Fitbit Charge 6 Credit: Kaitlyn Cimino / Android Authority TL;DR The deadline to move your existing Fitbit data to a Google account is fast approaching. You will lose your data if you don’t migrate it by May 19. The process is simple and takes a few steps, so there’s no reason for you not to. If you’re a long-time Fitbit user, you are required to switch to a Google account if you haven’t already done so. The deadline Google set for the transition is May 19, 2026, after which all your previous fitness activity stored in your Fitbit account will be lost forever. The writing has been on the wall since Google completed its acquisition of Fitbit in 2021 . Two years later, i.e., in 2023, Google started offering users the option to associate their existing Fitbit devices with a Google account ins
articles.title_zh: 擁有 Fitbit？若不立即採取行動，你將失去多年資料
articles.summary_zh: 將現有 Fitbit 資料遷移至 Google 帳號的截止日期即將到來，逾期不遷移將導致資料丟失；遷移過程簡單，無故不遷移。

articles.title: Samsung retakes the lead in Q1, but there’s bad news for other Android brands
articles.summary: Credit: Hadlee Simons / Android Authority TL;DR Samsung has regained its lead in the global smartphone market, according to tracking firm Omdia. Samsung was also the only Android brand in the top five to see yearly sales growth. HONOR wasn’t in the top five, but was the fastest-growing manufacturer in the top ten. Samsung surrendered its lead of the global smartphone market to Apple in Q4 2025, but the company usually retakes the lead in the following quarter. New data has indeed revealed good news for Samsung, but bad news for other top Android brands. Tracking firm Omdia posted its Q1 2026 global smartphone market share report, and Samsung was the top manufacturer for the quarter. The Korean manufacturer accounted for 22% of shipments compared to Apple’s 20% share.
articles.title_zh: Samsung 重奪 Q1 全球智慧手機市場領先地位，但其他 Android 品牌面臨壞消息
articles.summary_zh: 根據追蹤公司 Omdia 數據，Samsung 重新成為全球智慧手機市場領導者；也是前五大中唯一實現年成長的 Android 品牌。

Samsung MX and the Network Businesses division brought in KRW 38.1 trillion in consolidated revenue and made KRW 2.8 trillion in operating profit during the first quarter. Sales are higher than the year-ago quarter – the numbers for Q1 2025 were KRW 37 trillion in revenue and KRW...

articles.title: Google rolls picture-in-picture for global YouTube users
articles.summary: YouTube's picture-in-picture feature has been around for some time now, but until recently, it wasn't available to non-Premium users outside the US. You'd have to be either a Premium subscriber or be based in the US. Starting this week, YouTube is opening up the feature to non-Premium users globally, but with a small caveat. Non-paying Android and iOS users will be able to play long-form, non-music content in PiP mode. Users in the US are not affected by this change, though. In this regard, YouTube is putting Premium Lite members and non-Premium users on the same level, restricting...

articles.summary_zh: YouTube 的子母畫面功能現已向全球非 Premium 使用者開放，過去該功能僅限 Premium 用戶或美國用戶使用。

articles.title: Meta abandons open-source Llama for proprietary Muse Spark
articles.summary: Meta’s decided its new proprietary AI LLM, Muse Spark, would be much more profitable than the open-source Llama. What are Llama users to do?  Back in 2023, Meta released Llama 2.0 and proclaimed it to be open source. Even if Llama wasn’t actually open source , it sounded good to developers. Indeed, in October 2024, Meta founder and CEO Mark Zuckerberg proclaimed, “ Open Source AI is the Path Forward. ” In March of last year, the company issued a press release celebrating 1 billion downloads of Llama. That was then. This is now.  Meta’s pivot to proprietary AI For all practical purposes, Meta has abandoned developing Llama in favor of its new proprietary program, Muse Spark , announced this month. Meta Superintelligence Labs — a new division for
articles.title_zh: Meta 放棄開源 Llama，轉向專有的 Muse Spark
articles.summary_zh: Meta 決定使用新的專有 AI LLM Muse Spark，認為其比開源 Llama 更具盈利潛力。2023 年發布的 Llama 2.0 曾被宣稱為開源，但現在 Meta 正改變策略。

articles.title: Quickbase’s Pave targets vibe coding’s notorious 80% problem
articles.summary: Vibe coding was funky, then it was clunky. The ability to describe a software application’s intended form and function in natural language and then use a variety of agentic AI services to formulate and construct its codebase fitted the narrative of the agentic age, seemingly in perfect rhythm. But like all complex syncopation structures, it’s easy to miss a beat if you don’t know all the steps. Why vibe potentially stumbles Perhaps due to the transparency of its abstraction layers, possibly due to the spaghetti junctions of dependencies it can throw up, or perhaps due to a lack of foresight into the intricacies of bringing this type of application online in a debugged and stable state ready for scaling, vibe coding projects have been criticized for their constrained abili
articles.title_zh: Quickbase 的 Pave 解決 Vibe Coding 臭名昭著的 80% 問題
articles.summary_zh: Vibe Coding 曾看似新穎但體驗笨重，使用自然語言描述軟體應用程式並透過 AI 服務生成代碼的方式在 agentic 時代備受關注。
